textByHash.b7f2ed2ae240285a09a2c00d6f3dd183ce37b0d3: You beaten me. Ask your questions.
textByHash.813ceada547adb34d6c07b3b24366cd4bf1fde05: Far, far away. Me not know where. But high priest who come before me, he say that when goblins die in battle, our souls travel to Yu'biusk.
textByHash.6e1d06835e742b5408c8f527c050c3ca45f0b3bf: You not goblin high priest! Me only answer questions for goblin high priest!
textByHash.ea844648b484964f6299319233515ef7df748bf9: Why me here? Me die in battle, fighting humans! Why me not in Yu'biusk?
